channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Durban July Fashion Awards Recognize Outstanding Style and Design
item.description: The Durban July Fashion Awards, held at Greyville Racecourse, celebrated South Africa's fashion creativity with a Country Allure theme. Over 150 participants competed across four categories, showcasin...

item.title: Nollywood Actress Converts to Christianity After Nine Years of Illness
item.description: Nollywood actress Halima Abubakar has publicly announced her conversion from Islam to Christianity, attributing her recovery from a mysterious illness that kept her out of public life for nearly nine ...

item.title: Ongoing Ethnic Cleansing in Gaza and International Response
item.description: The article details the ongoing humanitarian crisis in Gaza, where Israeli military operations have resulted in significant civilian casualties and infrastructure destruction. It highlights allegation...

item.title: Day 1 of Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: Prosecution Claims Victory Amid Mixed Outcomes
item.description: The first day of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial on July 6, 2026, saw the prosecution claim a 'victory' despite mixed rulings from the Senate impeachment court. Prosecutors Jinky Luist...

item.title: Burna Boy Defends Luxury Car Purchase Amid Public Criticism
item.description: Nigerian singer Burna Boy faced widespread criticism after reports surfaced that he spent KSh 839 million on a custom Bugatti Chiron VXX Special Edition. The luxury vehicle, valued as one of the most ...

item.title: UEFA Criticizes FIFA's Decision to Suspend Balogun's Red Card
item.description: UEFA has strongly criticized FIFA's decision to suspend Folarin Balogun's red-card ban following U.S. President Donald Trump's intervention. The African-American striker was sent off for a tackle duri...

item.title: Tanzania Government Advances Digital Transformation in Cooperatives to Boost Youth Inclusion
item.description: The Tanzanian government has emphasized the need for cooperative societies to enhance accountability, adopt digital technologies, and increase youth and women's participation to foster a peaceful and ...

item.title: Spacex President Announces Stock Donation to Trump's Accounts
item.description: The article discusses the announcement by Elon Musk, CEO of SpaceX, regarding a stock donation to Donald Trump's personal and campaign accounts. Musk, who has a history of public support for Trump, pl...

item.title: Former President Zuma faces third attempt to overturn court order for R28.9m legal fees repayment
item.description: Former South African President Jacob Zuma is set to face his third attempt to overturn a court order requiring him to repay R28.9m in legal fees funded by taxpayers. The Constitutional Court has been ...

item.title: NSW Considers Banning Russian 'Z' Symbol as Hate Symbol
item.description: The New South Wales government is examining whether the Russian 'Z' symbol, associated with pro-Russian activists and the invasion of Ukraine, should be classified as a hate symbol. Ukrainian communit...

item.title: Analysis: Trump's declining influence as supporters ignore his crowd claims
item.description: The article analyzes President Donald Trump's recent attempt to inflate crowd numbers at his July 4th speech, contrasting it with his past claims about inauguration attendance. Unlike previous instanc...

item.title: Senate subpoenas Sara Duterte's financial records for impeachment probe
item.description: The Senate impeachment court has issued a subpoena requiring the submission of nearly two decades of financial records for Vice President Sara Duterte and her husband, Manases Carpio. The request span...

item.title: Rivers State Governor Highlights Importance of Security for National Development
item.description: Rivers State Governor Siminalayi Fubara emphasized that security is the cornerstone of a prosperous society during the 2026 Nigerian Army Day Celebration in Port Harcourt. He praised the Nigerian Army...

item.title: Tanzania Urges African Nations to Support Liberation Heritage Centre
item.description: Tanzania is urging African nations to take collective responsibility for supporting the African Liberation Heritage Centre in Dar es Salaam, emphasizing that preserving the continent’s independence st...

item.title: Sustainable Cooling Solutions for the UK's Rising Temperatures
item.description: The article discusses the growing reliance on air conditioning (AC) in the UK amid increasing heatwaves and its associated challenges. It highlights that while AC provides immediate relief, it comes w...

item.title: Prince Mampofu and Madagascan bride Koloin Ida share love story across borders
item.description: Prince Mampofu, sibling of actors Oros and Lunathi Mampofu, and his Madagascan bride Koloin Ida share a love story that began on TikTok in 2024. Their connection formed through shared faith and spirit...

item.title: Nigerian Armed Forces Achieve Significant Progress in Combating Security Threats
item.description: The Deputy Spokesperson of the House of Representatives, Philip Agbese, has praised the Nigerian Armed Forces for their operational successes under Chief of Defence Staff Gen. Olufemi Oluyede. Agbese,...

item.title: Mumbai faces severe flooding, school closures, and transport disruptions due to heavy rainfall
item.description: Mumbai is experiencing severe flooding and weather-related disruptions as heavy rains continue. The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a red alert, leading to the cancellation of all Uni...

item.title: Spain Likely to Defeat Portugal in High-Stakes World Cup Match
item.description: Opta's supercomputer analysis has predicted that Spain has a 61.91% chance of defeating Portugal in their highly anticipated Round of 16 clash at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The match, set to take place ...

item.title: Jet2 Luggage Size Restrictions and Allowances for Travelers
item.description: The article provides essential information for travelers flying with Jet2, detailing the airline’s luggage restrictions to avoid unexpected fees. It explains that hand luggage is free if it weighs no ...
